用例标题: 验证新建表-列表分区有多个分区字段
步骤:
1. 进入数据资产-数据模型-建表-建表配置，取消勾选mysql类型
2. 1）选择2个字段作为分区字段（字段名：dt，city）;2) 配置分区- 分区名：p202504_California；分区内容：(“2025-04-01“, “Los Angeles“),(“2025-04-01“, “San Francisco“),(“2025-04-02“, “Los Angeles“),(“2025-04-02“, “San Francisco“)- 分区名：p202504_Texas；分区内容：(“2025-04-01“, “Houston“),(“2025-04-01“, “Dallas“),(“2025-04-02“, “Houston“),(“2025-04-02“, “Dallas“)3）点击【生成建表语句】，查看SQL；4）确认建表
预期结果:
1. 成功进入数据资产-数据模型-建表-建表配置，取消勾选mysql类型页面，页面内容正常加载显示，无报错
2. 1）建表语句SQL正确，分区语句如下：PARTITION BY LIST (dt,city) ( PARTITION p202504_California VALUES IN ( (“2025-04-01“, “Los Angeles“), (“2025-04-01“, “San Francisco“), (“2025-04-02“, “Los Angeles“), (“2025-04-02“, “San Francisco“) ), PARTITION p202504_Texas VALUES IN ( (“2025-04-01“, “Houston“), (“2025-04-01“, “Dallas“), (“2025-04-02“, “Houston“), (“2025-04-02“, “Dallas“) ))2）表创建成功；

--  ...
create table bood_1_1(

phone varchar(10),

adress varchar(10)
)ENGINE=OLAP
DUPLICATE KEY(`id`, `name`)
COMMENT 'OLAPhhh'
DISTRIBUTED BY HASH(`id`) BUCKETS 10
PROPERTIES (
“replication_allocation“ = “tag.location.default: 1“,
“is_being_synced“ = “false“,
“storage_format“ = “V2“,
“light_schema_change“ = “true“,
“disable_auto_compaction“ = “false“,
“enable_single_replica_compaction“ = “false“
);
create table bood_1_2(
id int,
name varchar(10),
phone varchar(10)
)ENGINE=OLAP
DUPLICATE KEY(`id`, `name`)
COMMENT 'OLAPhhh'
DISTRIBUTED BY HASH(`id`) BUCKETS 10
PROPERTIES (
“replication_allocation“ = “tag.location.default: 1“,
“is_being_synced“ = “false“,
“storage_format“ = “V2“,
“light_schema_change“ = “true“,
“disable_auto_compaction“ = “false“,
“enable_single_replica_compaction“ = “false“
);

)ENGINE=OLAP

DISTRIBUTED BY HASH(`id`) BUCKETS 10
PROPERTIES (

“storage_format“ = “V2“,

“disable_auto_compaction“ = “false“,
“enable_single_replica_compaction“ = “false“
);
insert into bood_1_3 values(1,'nv');
create table bood_1_4(
id int,
adress varchar(10)
)ENGINE=OLAP
DUPLICATE KEY(`id`)
COMMENT 'OLAPhhh'
DISTRIBUTED BY HASH(`id`) BUCKETS 10
PROPERTIES (
